nasb.text: You have increased the nation, O Lord, You have increased the nation, You are glorified; You have extended all the borders of the land.

esv.text: But you have increased the nation, O Lord, you have increased the nation; you are glorified; you have enlarged all the borders of the land.

cnv.text: 耶和華啊！你增添國民； 你增添國民，你得了榮耀， 又拓展了地的四境。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊，你增添我们的人口， 增添我们的人口， 扩张我们的疆界， 你得到了荣耀。

csbs.text: 耶和华啊，你增添了国民， 你增添了国民！ 你得了荣耀！ 你扩展了国土的四境！
